title: Tangy Velvety Argentinian Pork Stir-fry
description: A tangy and velvety meal-prep Argentinean dish featuring digestive biscuits as a key ingredient for its unique texture.

ingredients.name: argentinian pork
ingredients.notes: ensure meat is cooked to at least 62.5°C (145°F) to avoid foodborne illnesses

ingredients.name: digestive biscuits
ingredients.notes: crumbled for added texture and flavor

instructions: Preheat your oven to 180°C (350°F). Pre-heat oil in a pan and fry the digestive biscuits until golden brown. Set aside.
Sauté the pork with ginger for about 5 minutes over medium heat, ensuring it's well-cooked through.
Add soy sauce, palm sugar/honey, lime juice, salt, and enough water to cover the meat; let simmer for a few minutes till reduced slightly.
Combine the stir-fried pork and digestive biscuits in a bowl. Garnish with fresh cilantro before serving.
